title: b8776
description: CUDA: Limit DeviceSegmentedSort to immediate mode ( #21718 ) CUDA: Limit DeviceSegmentedSort to immediate mode DeviceSegmentedSort is currently not capturable in a cuda graph. Hence, we have to go for the slower DeviceSegmentedRadixSort in that case. Perf numbers on RTX Pro 6000 Blackwell Max-Q: DeviceSegmentedRadixSort in graph mode (i.e. CUDA Graphs) ARGSORT(type=f32,ne=[2048,512,1,1],order=1): 12291 runs - 105.94 us/run - 8192 kB/run - 73.75 GB/s ARGSORT(type=f32,ne=[4096,512,1,1],order=1): 1
